name: Cream of Broccoli and Pea Soup (Mf)
recipeIngredient: 1 pound broccoli florets (stalks peeled), finely chopped
--or evaporated low fat or skimmed milk
Salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Simmer the broccoli and half the onion in the water or stock for 15 minutes or until tender.
2. Add the peas and simmer an additional 5 minutes to cook through.
3. Puree the mixture using a food mill or blender (if using a food processor or blender, pass the puree through a sieve).
4. In a clean saucepan, heat butter over low heat.
5. Add the remaining onion and cook until very tender but not brown.
6. Stir in the flour and cook for a few seconds.
7. Whisk in the strained puree and bring to a boil; simmer for 10 minutes.
8. Gradually add half and half or evaporated milk, adjusting texture as desired.
9. Bring to just under a boil before serving.
10. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
11. Garnish with snipped chives if desired.
Yield: 4 servings
